derivation: Selectors are keccak256 of the DEPLOYED COWShedFactory v1.0.1 runtime signatures (verifiable on-chain); the deployed 2-arg initializeProxy(address,bool) diverges from the cow-shed source-HEAD 1-arg form, so this record anchors to the deployed runtime. Canonical EIP-712 type-hash values are pinned by cow_shed/execute_hooks_digest.json; here only the no-whitespace type-string rule is pinned.

factory_methods.name: initializeProxy(address,bool)
factory_methods.rationale: Canonical 2-arg initializeProxy form per the deployed COWShedFactory v1.0.1 runtime (selector = keccak256 of the deployed signature). The 1-arg source-HEAD form is NOT vendored because the deployed bytecode targets the 2-arg selector.

factory_methods.name: executeHooks((address,uint256,bytes,bool,bool)[],bytes32,uint256,address,bytes)
factory_methods.rationale: Primary hook-execution entry point for relayed batches

factory_methods.name: executePreSignedHooks((address,uint256,bytes,bool,bool)[],bytes32,uint256,address)
factory_methods.rationale: Pre-signed hook-execution entry point indexed by struct hash without domain prefix

type_strings.Call: Call(address target,uint256 value,bytes callData,bool allowFailure,bool isDelegateCall)
type_strings.ExecuteHooks: ExecuteHooks(Call[] calls,bytes32 nonce,uint256 deadline)Call(address target,uint256 value,bytes callData,bool allowFailure,bool isDelegateCall)

signature_byte_order.rationale: COW Shed signed-hook signature carries r-then-s-then-v (not the standard v-then-r-then-s); enforced at the type level by a trybuild fixture in the cow-sdk-cow-shed body landing
